I'd love to bring that same momentum to a Buffalo nonprofit feeding our neighbors.

Fully remote — works from Buffalo
jobs.cover_letter_opener:
Dear Animalz Hiring Team,

I'm writing to express my interest in the Senior Content Marketer, SEO role at Animalz. In my current work as Communications & Marketing Coordinator at the University at Buffalo's RIED department — and earlier as a Junior Editor at The Daily Caller News Foundation — I've made a habit of translating research and ideas into resonant communications from Buffalo. I'd welcome the chance to bring that same craft to your team and to live my tagline: seek, speak, and write the truth.
